description: Structured routing feedback: plan adherence, user stance on skills/workflows, and workflow load. Not a runtime control channel — adapters emit these locally for policy learning.

event.type: skill_followed | skill_ignored | skill_rejected_by_user | workflow_too_heavy | workflow_success | workflow_failure | routing_conflict_escalated
event.skill: Optional. Normalized skill id or short name when the event refers to a skill.
event.workflow: Optional. Workflow label when the event refers to a workflow.
event.invocation_plan_id: Optional. Correlates with a prior invocation_plan / routing bundle id.
event.notes: Optional human-readable detail; required for some heuristics when skill/workflow omitted.
event.signal_strength: Optional 0–1; defaults to 1 for CLI/stdin. Lower values reduce automatic preference updates.

session.agent: Optional: claude | codex | cursor | copilot | other
